entries.title: 兼容苏州兼职群错序标签
entries.author: huajune
businessUpdates: 修复看板人工介入统计
summary: 兼容苏州兼职群错序标签
推荐班次必须列全所有档位
修复看板人工介入统计
Added a targeted compatibility override for `独立客&苏州餐饮兼职群` when its labels are returned as `["兼职群", "餐饮", "苏州"]`.
Kept the original label parsing contract for all other groups.
Added a regression test covering the known Suzhou group `wxid` and label order.
fixes: 修复看板人工介入统计
ops: Added a targeted compatibility override for `独立客&苏州餐饮兼职群` when its labels are returned as `["兼职群", "餐饮", "苏州"]`.
Kept the original label parsing contract for all other groups.
Added a regression test covering the known Suzhou group `wxid` and label order.
兼容苏州兼职群错序标签
推荐班次必须列全所有档位

entries.title: Fix group invite retry and memory metadata
entries.author: huajune
businessUpdates: fix the pipeline service spec to provide the new `LongTermService` dependency used by `AcceptInboundMessageService`
Fix group invite retry and memory metadata
summary: Fix group invite retry and memory metadata
add a compatibility retry for group invites when the current chat bot cannot see the room: add the chat bot to the target group via the owner bot, then retry the candidate invite
initialize long-term message metadata from new-customer callbacks and add a backfill script for existing rows
improve message splitting so booking/info form blocks stay together
add product docs for group invite behavior, ops-data / Sponge integration design, and operations-facing data definitions
fix the pipeline service spec to provide the new `LongTermService` dependency used by `AcceptInboundMessageService`
fixes: fix the pipeline service spec to provide the new `LongTermService` dependency used by `AcceptInboundMessageService`
Fix group invite retry and memory metadata
optimizations: improve message splitting so booking/info form blocks stay together
ops: add a compatibility retry for group invites when the current chat bot cannot see the room: add the chat bot to the target group via the owner bot, then retry the candidate invite
initialize long-term message metadata from new-customer callbacks and add a backfill script for existing rows
add product docs for group invite behavior, ops-data / Sponge integration design, and operations-facing data definitions
verification: Earlier focused checks before the CI fix: invite-to-group, accept-inbound-message, message-splitter, long-term, and supabase-store specs; plus focused ESLint on the changed source/test files
